## Cleanup-Only Contract
- [ ] This PR is cleanup-only under the cleanup proof contract

If checked, complete every field below before review. See
[`docs/design/cleanup-reviewer-checklist.md`](docs/design/cleanup-reviewer-checklist.md).

- Subsystem boundary: required for cleanup-only PRs
- Preserved invariant: required for cleanup-only PRs
- Primary proof form: required for cleanup-only PRs
- Evidence bundle: required for cleanup-only PRs
- Approval-trigger status: required for cleanup-only PRs (`none` if no trigger fired)
- Sequencing exception: `none` or `<dependency + why independent review is impossible>`
